name: preference-tracker
description: Automatic preference/pitfall/friction detection and memory enforcement for AI coding agents (Codex variant: audit log + wrapper enforcement via codex_preftrack).

interface.shortDescription: Records and enforces your coding-agent preferences
interface.longDescription: preference-tracker watches each turn, records the preferences, pitfalls and workflow rules it detects, and can enforce the ones you care about. Safe by default: out of the box it only records and reminds.
